CASTING CALL 
casting for extras in a music video which will be filmed over summer .
✨this will be paid work
✨any gender 
✨any enthnicity
✨16+
✨filming based in Liverpool
This is an exciting opportunity to work with an upcoming artist and meet a lot of creatives in the industry.
Please Contact using the details below !

IF THE EMAIL OR INSTAGRAM ISNT WORKING MESSAGE MYSLEF THROUGH FACEBOOK

user.name: Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

items.text:
🌟 *BIG NEWS! Welcome Emma Jane to Majestic Elite Associates!* Emma has been with Majestic doing some amazing choreography and now back with us for something spectacular! *Starting back in September*

We're incredibly excited to announce that Emma Jane will now be taking over our Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) programme as our lead choreographer!

Bringing a wealth of professional industry experience, creativity and passion, Emma is ready to inspire, challenge and develop the next generation of elite dancers.

Alongside Emma, meet Summer-Joules & Eva, two of our amazing MEA dancers who represent the standard, dedication and talent we're looking for.

✨ Could YOU be our next Majestic Elite Associate?

Expressions of Interest are 

NOW OPEN!

Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) is our audition or invitation-only elite training programme for dancers who want to perform, compete and train at the highest level.

*12 years and over - younger with exceptions of strong dancers*

✨ What you'll receive:

🏆 Elite dance & performance training
💜 Weekly inspiration and mentoring from Emma Jane
🥇 Competition opportunities, including Dance World Cup
🎭 Theatre, TV and live performance opportunities
🌍 Industry connections across the UK & Europe with the aim for paid work
🎓 Accredited examinations with UCAS points available
Commitment
📅 1 Sunday per month
➕ Optional Saturdays | 4:00pm-7:00pm
⚠️ Limited places available.
👉 Register your interest today:

https://tally.so/r/gDp48d

Train. Perform. Inspire. Become a Majestic Elite Associate. 💜💛

items.text:
Hi everyone - Channel 4's HANDCUFFED is back and looking for people to take part!  

If you have strong convictions, are passionate about what you believe in and have something to say, we want to hear from you!

 

How long could you survive being handcuffed to someone who sees the world differently to you? 

 

You’ll have the chance to share your opinions, influence someone else’s perspective, and win a share of £100,000. 

To apply, visit ww.handcuffedcasting.com

FOR A CHANCE TO EXPRESS YOUR BELIEFS, CHALLENGE OPINIONS AND WIN A SHARE OF 100,000 APPLYNOW NOW: WWW. WWW.HANDCUFFEDCASTING. MUSTB 18+. 72FILMS WILL ENSURE THAT REGULATION CTO F2018. sharedPost.text:
GWCI is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s) hip/cool/edgy Nightclub Patrons for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT 💃🎶
To submit, email all the following to njfilm@gwcnyc.com with the subject line “IG - NIGHTCLUB PATRONS”:
- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range 
- height, weight, clothing & shoe sizes 
- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

media.ocrText: May be an image of dancing and text that says 'እኧአእሆ casting call GWCIis is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s), HIP/COOL/EDGY NIGHTCLUB PATRONS for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT MUST BE OK WITH STROBE LIGHTS, LOUD MUSIC, AND ATMOSPHERIC SMOKE/ HAZE TENTATIVE SHOOT DATE: THURSDAY, JULY 23, 2026 AG-AFTRA PAY RATE: $231/8 HRS NON-SAG PAY RATE: $187/10HRS 10HRS FILMING IN PATTERSON, NJ TRANSPORTATION PROVIDED FROM MANHATTAN) መመተዮእኢላ'

items.text:
DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

*It is not necessary to submit your information before attending an open call*

Las Vegas on Monday, July 27, 2026
Millennium Dance Complex Las Vegas
6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)

6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
Agencja Aktorów i Statystów Merito z WFDiF

do niedzieli 12.07

poszukuje 30 osób do epizodów/ról w reklamie aplikacji emitowanej w Kanadzie,

szukają ludzi ( aktorów i amatorów) w wieku 16-80 lat (wymóg prawny ukończonych 16 lat)

każdej narodowości/pochodzenia i koloru skóry

Stawki: kilka tysięcy złotych w zależności od roli

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenie na maila:

casting@agencjamerito.pl

w temacie prosimy wpisać: Aplikacja

w treści maila prosimy napisać: Imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, czy jesteś w Agencji Merito

Do maila prosimy dołączyć max 2 zdjęcia (portret i sylwetka / ważące najlepiej nie więcej niż po 200KB), mogą być proste, amatorskie, takie, na których widać Cię w sposób naturalny i prawdziwy.

Wybranym osobom wyślemy maila ze wszystkimi informacjami na temat tego castingu,

warunkami zatrudnienia, stawkami,

+ podamy LINK do zgłoszenia ONLINE do tej reklamy.

lub

+ podamy namiary na casting w studiu we wtorek w Warszawie,

casting w studiu przeznaczony jest tylko dla ludzi 60+

Zastrzegamy sobie prawo do odpowiadania na wybrane zgłoszenia.

Możliwość nawiązania długofalowej współpracy przy wielu castingach i statystowaniach do reklam

Terminy projektu:

- zgłoszenia przez LINK najpóźniej do niedzieli 12.07 do końca dnia

- CASTING STACJONARNY (TYLKO DLA OSÓB 60+) we wtorek 14.07

- Recall czyli finał castingu w studiu: 17.07

- Przymiarki /24 lub 25.07

- Zdjęcia: 27.07, 28.07, 29.07, 30.07

(jeden dzień, ale dostępność na ten moment jest wymagana we wszystkie dni)

Jeśli ktoś jest już w bazie Merito i pasuje do roli, to dostał już od nas informacje o tym projekcie.

Zespół Agencji Merito

www.agencjamerito.pl

Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 3 (30) – przy kasie, sportowa elegancja 
Data: 16.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Detektyw (34) – prywatny detektyw.
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Strażnik Miejski 1 (36)  
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

4. Strażnik Miejski 2 (38)
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

5. Filip (41) – mechanik samochodowy; krótka fryzura
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto

6. Sławek Figurski (42) – mąż Figurskiej; średniego wzrostu.
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto

7. Kierowca (45) – przyjazna twarz. Tutaj szukam osoby z doświadczeniem przed kamerą która nie grała w Gliniarzach minimum 2 sezony
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 14.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

8. Czarnecki (51) – ojciec Igora; wysoki, szczupły biznesmen.
Data: 14.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto

9. Stanisław Bartczak (52) – sprawca; krępy, silny. 
Data: 14 i 15.07
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Looking for 5 actors who can sing local to Los Angeles to be part of an Audio book illustration project for an original musical. The musical style is Jazz Hip Hop.Please note: THE PROJECT IS UNPAID
Please email headshot, resume, and a sample of your singing and/reel to Georgejosephr11@gmail.com.

DeAndre Westwood: 
Age: mid 30s early forties 
Ethnicity: Black
Occupation: Vice Principal of Diamond Hill High School
Description: Alumni of Diamond Hill High School. Very passionate about education and the personal responsibility of the individual. Although he recognizes peoples’ struggles do exist, he’s doesn’t personalize them.

Marcus Harrison:
Age: 40s
Ethnicity: Black
Occupation: Principal of Diamond Hill High school
Description: Harrison has been principal of Diamond Hill High School for the past 6 years. He was never a resident of the city but experienced similar struggles growing up in Harlem, New York. An individual who doesn’t mind getting his hands dirty believing he’s making the best possible decision for himself and everyone else when even the school board doesn’t care.

David Garner:
Age: 18
Occupation: Senior in High School
Ethnicity: Ambiguous
Description: David is a strong willed individual, jokester, but stands his ground. Raised by a single father he does his best to cope with the environment and circumstances he was dropped into.

Mr. Carpe/Robert Atkins
Age: 50s – 60s
Occupation: Janitor
Ethnicity: Black/African descent
Description: Mr. Carpe is a former teacher of Diamond Hill High from when Westwood was a student. He does this for the students' sake no longer needing to work but still wanting to do something for the next generation. He talks to Westwood and knows everything going on in the campus as the janitor but avoids getting involved to allow himself to present an unbiased standpoint for all sides

Jonathan Hernandez: 
Age: 16
Ethnicity: Hispanic/Latin descent
Occupation:  Senior in High School & Student Representative of the board (Dreamer Student)
Description: Jonathan has always had his decisions made for him. His parents baby him a lot because he’s slightly on the spectrum. He respects Jordan a lot because he doesn’t cut him any slack and treats him as fully capable. Jonathan is a smart kid full of potential who really likes going to school. Although he struggles to express himself he means well always putting the masses before himself.

topComments.text: Which, LA? Los Angeles or Louisiana,  or Lower Alabama?

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting REAL PROFESSIONALS for a "DEWALT" commercial that is filming in the Northeast, OH area July 29th - 31st 2026.

*If you have already submitted, you do NOT need to submit again. We have your submission!*

Please read carefully below for details!

DETAILS:

Project: DeWalt Pro Outdoor Campaign

Filming Location: Northeast, OH (must be local hire)

Fitting Date: July 28th

Shoot Date(s): July 29th-31st 2026

*Talent will possibly be needed 1-3 days plus fitting, please list any conflicts*

Rain Date(s): August 1st & 2nd

Rate: 
$300 for Fitting Day
$1000 plus 20% per shoot day

Usage: Full photo and video buyout used globally in perpetuity - not for broadcast.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Real, professional arborists in their 20's and early 30's who have certificates and experience in tree climbing and limb cutting. You must have hands on experience performing this work safely. Ideally you will have your own equipment. Scenes will involve using the tools practically on location in a realistic way.

CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT: https://bit.ly/4vGW5uG

As this casting call is looking for real experience, feel free to share this post on social media! 

*If you have already submitted, you do NOT need to submit again. We have your submission!*

Kind Regards, 
Angela Boehm Casting 

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

🎬 **CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM**

**TITLE:** Short Film Edmonton

**LOCATION:** Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

**SHOOT DATES:** Early August 2026 (TBD) — 4-day shoot

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls for casting details.

Casting for a paid, non-union short film shooting in Edmonton, Alberta. The production is seeking Nepali actors based in Canada for two lead roles exploring themes of loneliness, connection, and resilience.

Non-union. Nepali actors based in Canada are specifically sought for both roles.

🎭 **ROLES**

**DIPEN – Lead**

Male | 25–30

• Nepali actor required

• An intelligent and caring architect who hides his loneliness behind routine and cooking

• After a life-changing cancer diagnosis, he must confront the emotional wounds he has avoided for years

**ANJALI – Lead**

Female | 20–25

• Nepali actor required

• A bright, ambitious intern who brings energy, optimism, and a fresh perspective into Dipen's life

🎥 **Details**

• Paid short film — non-union

• Location: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

• 4-day shoot — Early August 2026 (dates TBC)

• Nepali actors based in Canada sought for both roles

📩 **HOW TO APPLY**

Apply via Actors & Extras as a Talent PRO member with a 1-month FREE trial:

➡️ https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls

Know someone in Edmonton who should see this? Share it.

🔍 *This casting has been shared by Actors and Extras as a service to our talent directory members. We have received permission to share it and believe it to be legitimate. However, we strongly encourage all applicants to exercise due diligence and independently verify the details of the project before proceeding.*

items.title: 🎬 **CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM "UNPROVEN" (Vancouver, BC)**

Hello! We're casting two lead roles and several supporting roles for ***Unproven***, an independent narrative short film set over one rainy night in a 24-hour Vancouver laundromat.

The film explores identity, migration, memory, and the fragile line between truth and performance. It is intended for the international festival circuit.

**Expected production:** late Sept/ early Oct 2026

**Non-Union, Volunteer (Meals and Credit provided)**

**Lead Role #1 – ISHAAN (Male, 20–25), South Asian**
Pakistani international student. Intelligent, observant, and quietly guarded. Ishaan is preparing for an asylum claim based on his sexuality, rehearsing a story he hopes will be believed. Beneath his composure lies uncertainty, vulnerability, and a dry sense of humour. Strong English required. Urdu proficiency is welcome but not required.

**Lead Role #2 – AH LONG (Male, 24–30), East Asian**
Hong Kong migrant working in Vancouver. Reserved, emotionally restrained, with a quiet wit. He carries unresolved grief while carefully avoiding conversations about his own past. **Native or fluent Cantonese and strong English required.**

**Supporting role - **FRIEND A (Male, 20–30)

International student. Charismatic, confident, and slightly mischievous. Sparks a conversation that unknowingly changes Ishaan's perspective.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting role- **FRIEND B (Any Gender, 20–30)

International student. Curious, skeptical, and quick to react. Serves as the emotional counterpoint during the dorm conversation.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting roles - SUPERMARKET COLLEAGUES (*Cantonese-speaking*)**

**OLDER MAN (Male, 55–70)**
Long-time Hong Kong immigrant. Friendly and well-meaning, though occasionally dismissive without realizing it.

**WOMAN (Female, 45–65)**
Warm and practical. Tries to ease tension among coworkers.

**YOUNGER COLLEAGUE (Male, 30–40)**
Recently immigrated from Hong Kong. Quiet, weary, and waiting for his immigration status. *Native or fluent Cantonese required.*

**LAUNDROMAT CUSTOMER (Female, 45–70)**

A middle-aged woman quietly folding laundry late at night. No dialogue. A subtle but important presence that grounds the space in everyday reality.

**FAST FOOD CUSTOMERS (Male, 20–40)**

Two ordinary men sharing a quiet moment over a late-night meal. No dialogue. Comfortable with subtle, natural physical interaction.

Previous acting experience is welcome but not required. We are looking for performers with a naturalistic screen presence.

To submit, please send to **unprovenfilm@gmail.com**:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape (if available)
• Contact information

Thank you!

items.text:
Hi filmmakers,
I’m always looking to collaborate with talented, thoughtful people who are telling stories that matter. I’ve been fortunate to build a long career as a character actor, working in comedy and drama, in both film and television.  

IMDB: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8)

DEMO: [https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1) 

At this stage, I’m especially excited by strong scripts, bold directors, and roles that let me bring humanity, humor, and depth to the screen. Please take a look at my demo reel. I’d be grateful for your consideration, and I’d love to connect about the possibility of working together.

items.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl über Betriebsausgaben. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl über Betriebsausgaben. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Welche Wirkung hat meine künstlerische Arbeit auf Publikum, Gesellschaft oder Auftraggeber*innen? Wie lässt sich ihr Wert vermitteln – auch jenseits des Monetären? Und wie kann ich den Nutzen meiner Kunst so kommunizieren, dass er für andere greifbar und nachvollziehbar wird? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting tauschen wir Erfahrungen, Perspektiven und praktische Ansätze aus. Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir, wie wir unsere künstlerische Arbeit selbstbewusst nach außen vertreten, unsere Außenwirkung gezielt gestalten und mit einem klaren Verständnis des eigenen Wertes in Gespräche, Projekte und Verhandlungen gehen können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die ihre künstlerische Position schärfen, sich inspirieren lassen und sich mit Kolleg*innen vernetzen möchten. 

© Alexandr Ivanov 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/9GwVTnc5y 
 

#Kultur #Kunst #Künstlerinnen #Kreativität #Kunstschaffen #BusinessFrühstück #Selbstmarketing #Kulturmanagement #Netzwerken #Wien #Innovation

sharedPost.text:
🎸 Epiphone Les Paul – Final Test After Setup

Testing this Epiphone Les Paul after a complete professional setup.

Work completed:
✔ Neck adjustment
✔ Action optimized
✔ Intonation calibrated
✔ Bridge setup
✔ Hardware check
✔ Final playability test

Now the guitar feels smoother, more stable and ready to play.

A proper setup can completely change the way your instrument responds.

📍 Berlin
📲 WhatsApp: +49 151 2478 2561

✅ Free diagnostic available
DM to book your guitar or bass setup.

items.text:
STOP venligst med at koge kartofler i vand! Da min bedstemor hørte, at jeg koger kartofler i vand for at lave kartoffelmos, grinede hun bogstaveligt talt af mig. Hun delte den hemmelige ingrediens til at lave den bedste kartoffelmos nogensinde. Brug denne ingrediens i stedet – jeg lægger opskriften nedenunder. .
Jeg må udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak. Fuld opskrift

items.title: STOP venligst med at koge kartofler i vand! Da min bedstemor hørte, at jeg koger kartofler i vand for at lave kartoffelmos, grinede hun bogstaveligt talt af mig. Hun delte den hemmelige ingrediens til at lave den bedste kartoffelmos nogensinde. Brug denne ingrediens i stedet – jeg lægger opskriften nedenunder. .

items.text:
Hi everybody,

Does anyone have any movies that are not under active distribution? If so, we hopefully want to interest you in joining the platform. 

FLINK was created to help independent films continue finding audiences long after their festival run or theatrical release cycle has ended. The platform provides a home for films that may no longer have active distribution, as well as titles that are difficult to access through current streaming services and traditional distribution channels.

Filmmakers retain full ownership, set their own pricing and territorial availability, and can remove their films from the platform at any time.

The platform is entirely free to join, with audiences purchasing directly from filmmakers.

We are officially launching live to the public on 21 July 2026. 

If this sounds of interest, I'd be delighted to send over our information pack and answer any questions you may have. Send me an email on klara@flink.movie.

thank you))

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS - VOICE PROJECTION LESSONS FACE TO FACE AND ONLINE.
I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.text:
Hello,

I am looking for an actor (male- 55-65 years old) to play Edward, a respected, slightly guru-ish, singer/songwriter in a short feature (60mins approx.) shooting in London for two days in October and Portland, Dorset for two days in November this year.

The plot- Eve, a woman in her 60s, living in her mother's house (her mother has died) in Portland in a fairly chaotic manner- drinking, making the odd bit of art without a definite purpose. When she was younger she was in a band with her then partner Edward who has gone on to be a respected, successful, slightly 'guru-ish' singer/ songwriter. He comes to visit her out of the blue when he is touring nearby and they talk. 

That's sort of the whole plot. The drama is in the conversation and the tension between their worldviews, probably you could say particularly about creativity. 

Paid (£500 flat rate). More details below. Please get in touch if you are interested. If I have forgotten any important info please ask.

topComments.text: Hi James, will send you a message ￼
Messaged you

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of text that says "CAST CALL (Paid)- For EXPOSURE, a short Edward, a successful and respected musician, returns to his home town to visit his former feature (50 mins) girlfriend and collaborator Eve. There follows a series of discussions of relationships, art, pain, £,500 flat fee witchcraft, ambition and dangerous spirits set against the awesome coastline. Edward- Male- 55-65 years Shooting 2 days in London Oct & 2 days in Portland, Dorset, UK, November 2026 Contact Jamie at- jamielynchpost@gmail.com WhatsApp: 07581905947 DiegeticPictures"

This is a brilliant opportunity to perform for Kate Bone, an award-winning Casting Associate who is exceptionally busy and difficult to schedule. After maintaining contact for the last two years to organise a session, we have finally secured a date for this exclusive event.

Kate’s impressive portfolio includes work on major productions such as:

  - Star Wars
  - Game of Thrones
  - The Crown

Her recent projects include the Agatha Christie production and Star City, both of which were released earlier this year in 2026. Do not miss the chance to showcase your talent to one of the industry's most sought-after casting professionals.

Kate Bone has been Casting Associate with multiple award winning casting directors such as Nina Gold and Robert Sterne for over a decade - operating at the very heart of two of the biggest casting offices in the world.

She has worked on high profile projects including Netflix The Crown, Chernobyl, Succession , The Little Stranger, Star Wars: The Force Awakens, Game of Thrones and The Imitation Games amongst many others.
 

THIS IS A 4-WEEK ACTING COURSE. 

- Your Spotlight Profile: Receive feedback on how your digital presence translates to casting directors.
- Performance Technique: Gain direct insight into your acting choices and execution.
- Career Development: Discuss your trajectory and any industry-specific queries you may have.

The final week will consist of a Mock Casting and Zoom session with Kate, offering a valuable opportunity to apply the skills developed throughout the previous three weeks in a practical setting.
 

Course Schedule:

- Week 1: Sunday, 30th August | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 2: Sunday, 6th September | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 3: Sunday, 13th September | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 4 (Final Session Mock Casting : Thursday, 17th September | Evening [Exact Time TBC]

Taught By RESPONDER ACTRESS Chrissy Parle

@studio 96 Media City Manchester

Click here to book your place : https://screenplayacting.com/product/4-week-adult-acting-course-kate-bone/

items.text:
Letzte Chance dabei zu sein!
Offenes Jurycasting im Kloster Graefenthal in Goch

Die Suche nach neuen Talenten geht weiter!

Du begeisterst mit deiner Stimme, deiner Tanzperformance, Artistik, Comedy oder einem anderen außergewöhnlichen Talent? 

Dann nutze jetzt die Gelegenheit und präsentiere dein Können unserer Jury. 

Ganz gleich, ob Anfänger oder Bühnenerfahrung wir freuen uns auf alle Talente.

Jetzt: Sonntag, 12. Juli 2026

12:00 bis 18:00 Uhr

Kloster Graefenthal

Maasstraße 48–50

47574 Goch

Bitte bringe Folgendes mit:

• Gute Laune und Freude an deinem Auftritt

• Bei Gesang, Tanz oder Comedy: einen USB-Stick mit deinem Playback

• Musiker und Bands: eigene Instrumente, Verstärker und benötigte Anschlüsse

• Artisten und Akrobaten: alle für den Auftritt erforderlichen Requisiten

• Minderjährige können nur in Begleitung eines Erziehungsberechtigten teilnehmen.

Spontan teilnehmen? Kein Problem!

Eine vorherige Anmeldung ist nicht erforderlich. Du kannst einfach vorbeikommen und dich direkt vor Ort für das Jurycasting anmelden.

Wer sich seinen Platz bereits im Voraus sichern möchte, kann sich bequem online registrieren.

Online-Bewerbung & weitere Informationen:

www.evctalentcastingshow.de/bewerbung

Kennst du jemanden mit einem besonderen Talent?

Dann markiere die Person in den Kommentaren oder teile diesen Beitrag. 

Vielleicht beginnt genau an diesem Sonntag der Weg bis ins große Finale der EVC Talent Casting Show 2026.

Wir freuen uns auf einen abwechslungsreichen Casting-Tag und viele beeindruckende Talente!

• Musiker und Bands: eigene Instrumente, Verstärker und benötigte Anschlüsse

• Artisten und Akrobaten: alle für den Auftritt erforderlichen Requisiten

• Minderjährige können nur in Begleitung eines Erziehungsberechtigten teilnehmen.

Spontan teilnehmen? Kein Problem!

Eine vorherige Anmeldung ist nicht erforderlich. Du kannst einfach vorbeikommen und dich direkt vor Ort für das Jurycasting anmelden.

Wer sich seinen Platz bereits im Voraus sichern möchte, kann sich bequem online registrieren.

Online-Bewerbung & weitere Informationen:

www.evctalentcastingshow.de/bewerbung

Kennst du jemanden mit einem besonderen Talent?

Dann markiere die Person in den Kommentaren oder teile diesen Beitrag. 

Vielleicht beginnt genau an diesem Sonntag der Weg bis ins große Finale der EVC Talent Casting Show 2026.

Wir freuen uns auf einen abwechslungsreichen Casting-Tag und viele beeindruckende Talente!

items.text:
Paid Opportunity - Alhambra Theatre, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

The Alhambra pantomime runs from 6th-29th December, and rehearsals take place from 16th November. 

The Alhambra Theatre Trust is searching for an exceptional male-identifying performer to take on the iconic title role of Peter Pan in this year’s spectacular Christmas pantomime, “The New Adventures of Peter Pan – The Return of Captain Hook.”

This is your chance to embark on a swashbuckling adventure, captivate audiences of all ages, and be there hero in a production packed with laughter, spectacular flying, dazzling musical numbers and all the magic that makes the Alhambra pantomime one of Scotland’s festive highlights.

We are looking for someone who is:

· An energetic performer with a young playing age.

· Full of fun, personality and bubbling enthusiasm.

· A confident storyteller who can connect effortlessly with audiences of all ages.

· A strong singer with a contemporary Pop/Musical Theatre style voice.

· Comfortable moving well and learning professional flying techniques (full flying training will be provided).

Previous pantomime and comedy experience is desirable, but not essential. Above all, we’re looking for a charismatic performer with infectious youthful exuberance who can truly bring the ‘Boy Who Never Grew Up’ to life.

**Audition Information**

In-Person Auditions: Sunday 9 August 

Venue: The Alhambra Theatre, Dunfermline

Applicants will be sent information in advance to prepare -

· A short, character-based monologue in a pantomime style as Peter Pan.

· A verse and chorus of an upbeat pop song.

Please also include:

· An up-to-date CV

· Current headshot

Send all materials to: info@alhambradunfermline.com

Submission Deadline: Friday 31 July 

If you’ve got the heart of a hero, the spirit of adventure and you’re ready to soar above the stage, we’d love to hear from you.

Come and be part of the magic.

Come and fly with us this Christmas at the Alhambra Theatre, Dunfermline!

items.text:
🎬 Szukamy osób do występu w rolkach na social media!

Realizujemy kampanię dla firmy z branży transportu międzynarodowego. Poszukujemy osób, które swobodnie czują się przed kamerą i wystąpią w materiałach na social media

📍 Miejsce nagrań: Ozimek (woj. opolskie)
📅 Termin: 23.07 lub 28.07 (dokładny termin do ustalenia)

Kogo szukamy?

👩 Kobieta 40+ – do roli opiekunki

👨 Mężczyzna ok. 35+ – do roli pracownika branżowego (elektryk/budowlaniec)

🎥 Zakres współpracy:
udział w ok. 6 rolkach na social media
sesja zdjęciowa
nagranie dodatkowych ujęć (przebitek), które zostaną wykorzystane w innych materiałach

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego, najważniejsze jest, abyś czuł(a) się swobodnie przed kamerą i naturalnie wypadał(a) przed obiektywem

📩 Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany(a) lub znasz kogoś, kto idealnie pasuje do projektu, zgłoś się w komentarzu. Mile widziane aktualne zdjęcia oraz kilka słów o sobie

💰 Wynagrodzenie oraz szczegóły współpracy ustalamy indywidualnie w wiadomości prywatnej

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 📩

items.text:
ZAGRAJ W FILMIE!
Poszukujemy dziewczyn w wieku 18-35 lat wyglądających jak fanki Taylor Swift

DATY: 10/07/2026 - plan nocny, zbiórka 14:00, Pałac Kultury - 170 zł 

ZGŁOSZENIA na adres: juliacast.kontakt@gmail.com

W tytule: TAYLOR SWIFT

W treści: Imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, wzrost, zdjęcie

topComments.text:
Rozpoczął się Miesiąc Dumy Osób z Niepełnosprawnością. Ja tam zawsze widzę człowieka a nie niepełnosprawność. Chociaż nie wiem czy tak naprawdę wszyscy jesteśmy trochę osobami z niepełnosprawnością, pewnie nie. Istnieje całą masa niewidocznej niepełnosprawności. Doprowadza mnie do szału gdy ktoś mnie pyta czy potrzebuję pomocy tylko dlatego, że mam kule. Gdyby nie kule to nikt by mnie nie zaczepiał bez powodu a ja tych kul nawet nie widzę i mam to gdzieś. Nie udało mi się zoorganizować Marszu w lipcu bo zabrakło mi sił psychicznych. Nie składam broni, może się uda. Będę prowokować, pisać e-maile i dzwonić. Nie ma nas w lipcowym numerze Vogue, nic tak nam nie pomoże jak wejście do głównego nurtu popkultury, ale to nikogo nie obchodzi. Skoro tak wielu ludzi udało się przekonać, że gej jest ok to dla osób z niepełnosprawnością hetero lub nie, też jest nadzieja. Czerwcowy numer kwitł od "pełnosprawnych gejów". Po ostatnim wpisie Sylwii Błach i wpisie sytuacji prezeski Kulawej Warszawy w Medicover mam wrażenie, że czasem wciąż jesteśmy w 1990 roku. Myślenie lekarzy, że chłopak to brat, mówienie per "ty" na ulicy czy w gabinecie lekarskim, sytuacja z 2% na rynku pracy. 

Wpisy Zołzy na Pająku czy Blondynki na kołach również pokazują jak polskie społeczeństwo wciąż zamiata pod dywan normalizację niepełnosprawności. Pani Małgorzata Szumowska od Niewidzialnej Wystawy wraz z swoimi ludźmi zorganizowała Marsz który odbędzie się 18 lipca na Placu Zamkowym.  Katarzyna Czajka - Kominiarczuk napisała kiedyś świetny wpis o dostępności kin dla osób z niepełnosprawnością fizyczną i sensoryczną. Kasia jako jedna z niewielu recenzentek filmowych w Polsce wspomniała o infantylizacji i przekoloryzowaniu Nastazji z "Święta Ognia" Kingi Dębskiej. Dzisiaj dostałem bana od ZvsZ za ciągłe wspomnienie o Miesiącu Dumy OzN. Mam nadzieję, że Kasia lub Paweł jeszcze napiszą czy powiedzą coś o lipcowym Miesiącu Dumy Osób z Niepełnosprawnością. 

Rozumiem, że wsparcie i widoczność pełnosprawnych gejów czy afera z Ignacym Lissem to wciąż coś bardziej oczywistego do omówienia. Dziękuję Kasi za to, że nie zamyka oczu na wiele rzeczy. Poruszenie po tym jak Wojciech Sawicki zwolnił asystenta przed Świętami po to by ratować sytuację swojej ex czy jak jego była żona się na nich wyżywała było nieproporcjonalnie mniejsze w polskich mediach niż to co się wydarzyło po słowach Ignacego Lissa, który nie chodzi na Parady Równości. Od stycznia 2025 rodzic może pracować przy jednoczesnym pobieraniu zasiłku. Jednak to znowu bujdy na resorach bo jest podział na rodziców ze starymi i nowymi zasadami. Jak łatwo nadal odbierać komuś konstytucyjne prawo do pracy bo Państwo nadal ma problem z tym, że ktoś jednocześnie pobiera zasiłek bo jego przeciętne często przekraczają te przeciętne.

items.text:
📣 **Parents, considering home education from September? **
***Feeling nervous? Not sure where to start?***

Hi 👋🏼
We are Josh & Aimee, owners of Swan Tutoring! An online, flexible education platform for home educating families 🏡

In August** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨ designed for those who are considering home education and are new to it, and those who have been home educating for a while!** You can try our engaging online classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
14 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Anna Śliwińska, Śliwa (43) – twarda, dość wysportowana babka z półświatka, groźna i charakterna (1,1A,2,3,4,12,21 + PPS3,PPS5)AKTORKA

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 20.07 i 24.07

Stawka: 1400zł na rękę 

2. Kryminalny 1 (35-50) –  policjant kryminalny – wysportowaniy, dobrze zbudowany, krótkie włosy, zarosty, cywilny outfit (4) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

3. Kryminalny 2 (35-50) –  policjant kryminalny – wysportowaniy, dobrze zbudowany, krótkie włosy, zarosty, cywilny outfit (4) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

4. Gangster 1 (35-50) – groźnie wyglądający typ z półświatka (17,18,19 + PPS6) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

5. Gangster 1 (35-50) – groźnie wyglądający typ z półświatka (17,18,19 + PPS6) 2 PLAN

Terminy:1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 400 na rękę 

6. Bruno (42) – twardy i groźnie wyglądający przestępca (18,19) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

7. Borys (34) – twardy i groźnie wyglądający przestępca. (18,19) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07 

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

8. Kelnerka (22) –ładna i zadbana kelnerka, nieco zołzowaty styl (18) EPIZOD

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

9. Gangus 1 (30-40) –  dwóch twardych gangusów – uwaga, w role wcielą się znajomi Aleksa, którzy znają choreografię walki do sceny 23! (22,23)SPEC.

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.07

Stawka: 600zł na rękę 

10. Gangus 2 (30-40) –  dwóch twardych gangusów – uwaga, w role wcielą się znajomi Aleksa, którzy znają choreografię walki do sceny 23! (22,23)SPEC.

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.07

Stawka: 600zł na rękę 

11. Lipin (41) – groźnie wyglądający gangster, obcinacz palców, ale zachowujący pozory elegancji (23,25) 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

12. Luiza (11) – córka Śliwy, drobna dziewczynka (24) EPIZOD
 
Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.07

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

13. Pakus (45) – szemrany koleś z półświatka, całkiem przystojny, typ zawadiaki – tylko PPS1,PPS5 EPIZOD  - Konieczne PRAWO JAZDY

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 20.07

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

14. Żona Tomasza – żona Tomasza 2 PLAN

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.07

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Jeżeli ktoś nie ma żadnych materiałów, to proszę o informację w mailu. Podeślę wybranym osobom scenkę do nagrania.

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.title: Dzień dobry! Casting do 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie!

items.text:
UWAGA!!! PILNE!!! PRZYSZŁY TYDZIEŃ!!!

Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam kilu osób do ról z bardzo małą ilością tekstu:

- Kuzyn (30- 40 lat) –  Wierzy, że dla rodziny trzeba wskoczyć w ogień. Doba sylwetka. 3 sceny 
OBOWIĄZKOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!
DATA: 16.07 i 17.07
STAWKA: 800 zł netto za 2 dni

- Kumpel  (20-25) – Kumpel Studenciaka. Razem studiują i imprezują. 
1 scena 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Dłużnik (25- 35) – Niespełniony biznesmen, który popadł w długi i kłopoty. Ubrany w chinosy i koszulę. 1 scena 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

- Hanna Kowalewska (około 30 lat) – Cwaniara, której najbardziej zależy na pieniądzach.  2 sceny 
OBOWIĄZKOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

I’m searching for a GRINCH actor for this Christmas Season for my company ‘A Princess To Your Door’ 💚 for a mix of meet and greet events, parties and home visits 

Must be:
📍 Local to Burnley, Lancashire 
📅 available on all dates ideally
💚 Comfortable having full facial prosthetics 
✨Able to accurately portray the Grinch - including voice

Dates: 

7th Nov
17th Dec
19th Dec
20th Dec 
22/23/24th Dec

DM for more info or email info@aprincesstoyourdoor.co.uk

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Mondays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

❗Videographer Needed urgently❗

The Elektric Apple Disability Theatre School need your help!!!!

We are currently in need of someone who can video this incredible show. 

Date: Thursday 9th July

Time: 6pm - 10pm

Venue: Liverpool Lighthouse Theatre

The cast are phenomenal and we are looking for some to help!!

If you help can or no someone who can help us, please private message!!

 Look forward to hearing from you

Nicky xx

Jodi Purdy Casting Director seeks Sophisticated & Intelligent Model-type Beautiful Non-Union Actresses (25-35) with Resumes & Reels (if available) for upcoming PAID Commercials!! 

All Ethnicities Welcome! 

Filming in Greater Boston area!!

Must know how to Act On-Camera and Take Direction On Set.

Must be Camera Ready with Hair, Make Up, Wardrobe.

Must be Punctual. 

Must be Professional!

Must Understand this is a Job not a Social Networking Event!

Submit:

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos
Resume
Reels
Videos
1 Minute Video Introduction 

Do Not Send Filtered or Touched Up Photos

Do Not Send Links to Portfolios

To:
JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject:  NU Actress 25-35

GWCI is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s) hip/cool/edgy Nightclub Patrons for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT 💃🎶
To submit, email all the following to njfilm@gwcnyc.com with the subject line “IG - NIGHTCLUB PATRONS”:
- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range 
- height, weight, clothing & shoe sizes 
- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL FILMMAKERS & SCREENWRITERS! 🎬

The 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is accepting submissions! We are bringing the magic of independent cinema right to the heart of the world: Times Square, NYC from October 22nd – 25th, 2026. 🗽✨

To celebrate 🇺🇸Independence Day🇺🇸 we’re giving you our biggest discount of the season.

🔥 FOURTH OF JULY SPECIAL: 50% OFF! 🔥
Get a massive 50% off your submission fee this weekend only. Don’t wait until the regular deadlines—lock in your entry now for half the price!

PROMO CODE: JULYWEEKEND50

DEADLINE: This offer expires on Monday, July 6th at midnight!

🎥 What We Are Accepting:
We want to see your unique voice, regardless of the budget or style. We are accepting all genres across the following categories:

✨ Feature Films

⏱️ Short Films

📹 Documentaries

🎨 Animation

🤖 AI Films

📝 Feature Screenplays

✍️ Short Screenplays

Whether you have a gripping drama, a mind-bending sci-fi, a stunning doc, or a cutting-edge AI project, AMT is your stage.

Ready to screen in Times Square? Head over to FilmFreeway now, submit your project, and use code JULYWEEKEND50 at checkout! 🎟️

Do rolek motoryzacyjnych poszukujemy aktora (najchętniej) z okolic Poznania. 

Nie mamy zwrotu kosztów dojazdu i nie zapewniamy noclegu.

items.text:
🎬 LOS ANGELES FILM CREW & PRODUCTION VOLUNTEERS NEEDED – JULY 31
We’re currently building our production team for a professionally filmed, broadcast-quality awards gala taking place on Friday, July 31 in Inglewood, CA.

This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience on a high-caliber, multi-camera live production while supporting an incredible cause. The evening will feature celebrity honorees, VIP guests, live musical performances, and cinematic video elements, with proceeds benefiting scholarships and educational opportunities for underserved students and families throughout Los Angeles.

We’re looking for experienced professionals, recent graduates, and advanced college students interested in the following roles:

• Production Manager

• Stage Manager

• Assistant Stage Manager

• Video Director / Switcher Operator (experienced)

• Camera Operator

• Playback / Graphics Operator

• Audio Assistant

• Lighting Technician

• Event Photographer

• Social Media Content Creator

• VIP / Talent Coordinator

• Production Assistants / Runners

Crew Details

📍 Inglewood, CA

📅 Friday, July 31

🕒 Crew Call: Approximately 3:00 PM

💻 One mandatory virtual production meeting prior to the event (scheduled around crew availability)

What You’ll Receive

✅ Professional production credit for your résumé/portfolio

✅ Hands-on experience on a large-scale live event

✅ Networking with experienced production and event professionals

✅ Meals provided

✅ Parking provided

Limited stipends may be available for select specialized technical positions based on experience.

If you’re interested, please email tdninvestmentgroups@gmail.com with:

* Your résumé

* A brief summary of your experience

* Production credits and/or portfolio (if available)

* The position(s) you’re interested in

* Your contact information

We’re looking for passionate, dependable team members who want to contribute to a meaningful event while gaining valuable live production experience. We look forward to hearing from you!

topComments.text: I am interested. Please reach out

items.text:
🌺 Foreign Dancer Job Opportunity – Changzhou, China
📍 Location: Changzhou, Jiangsu Province, China

🏝️ Work Venue:

* Xixigu Scenic Area (Theme Park)

🔎 Open Positions:

* 6 Female Dancers (Caucasian/White)

💃 Performance Style:

* Hawaiian Hula Dance

📅 Contract Duration:

* 6 months

🎬 Performance Schedule:

* 4 shows per day (regular days)
* 5 shows per day (weekends and public holidays)
* Each show lasts 15 minutes

📆 Days Off:

* 4 days off per month

🎁 Benefits:

* Free work visa
* Free accommodation
* Free meals
* Round-trip airfare provided

🚀 Start Date:

* To be confirmed

📩 Interested applicants, please send your recent videos, photos, and artistic profile.

🌺 Foreign Dancer Job Opportunity – Changzhou, China
📍 Location: Changzhou, Jiangsu Province, China

🏝️ Work Venue:

* Xixigu Scenic Area (Theme Park)

🔎 Open Positions:

* 6 Female Dancers (Caucasian/White)

💃 Performance Style:

* Hawaiian Hula Dance

📅 Contract Duration:

* 6 months

🎬 Performance Schedule:

* 4 shows per day (regular days)
* 5 shows per day (weekends and public holidays)
* Each show lasts 15 minutes

📆 Days Off:

* 4 days off per month

🎁 Benefits:

* Free work visa
* Free accommodation
* Free meals
* Round-trip airfare provided

🚀 Start Date:

* To be confirmed

📩 Interested applicants, please send your recent videos, photos, and artistic profile.
items.title: 🌺 Foreign Dancer Job Opportunity – Changzhou, China

Rush Call Tomorrow 10am
UPDATE: BOOKED TY!

Someone just messaged that they can’t make it tomorrow so looking for background replacement asap!

Role: 30+ male church goer 

Location: 90037

Call time: 10am

Wardrobe: 3 Colorful, Sundays best options

Pay: $135/8

I just a need photo of you to submit to the director. PM me asap, hopefully sending within the next hour. I’ll also need email and phone number for the call sheet

topComments.text: I’m good for tomorrow at 10am

items.text:
Hi everyone! 

We are relaunching our **blackout studio** in **South Croydon**, **Aura studios**! 

We are a state of the art blackout studio with a** drive in door**, **rain machine**, **fire machine**, **full lighting and camera equipment** and more to allow our clients to be able to create whatever they need. Whether they have their own kit or just a vision we can help to bring to life!

We offer a wide array of packages from **video and editing content** created specifically to your needs, with our own dedicated production team with years of experience; to **full access** to the studio and equipment you need to best create your vision.

The studio has been around for a few years and produced some incredible shoots over that time, we have just undergone** full renovations** of our floor and lighting set up to allow for the best quality of productions possible. 

To book a session go to https://www.auravisionstudios.com or send me a PM here or on instagram @fye_productions or @auravisionstudios

Use the code 'MAXWELL5' to get 5% of your booking when you book a shoot online or through myself.

items.text:
Det er så lækkert! Jeg laver kartofler som denne hver dag! En simpel og meget velsmagende opskrift!
Ingredienser:
● Kartofler - 8 stk.
● Bacon – 230 g
● Smør – 40 g
● 3 fed hvidløg
● Paprika, salt, sort peber...
Jeg skal lige sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter...
 Tak.
Opskrift øverst R.E.P.L.Y. Se mindre

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of shepherd's pie, tart and apple

Jeg skal lige sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter...
 Tak.
Opskrift øverst R.E.P.L.Y. Se mindre

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 3 (30) – przy kasie, sportowa elegancja 
Data: 16.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Detektyw (34) – prywatny detektyw.
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Strażnik Miejski 1 (36)  
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

4. Strażnik Miejski 2 (38)
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

5. Filip (41) – mechanik samochodowy; krótka fryzura
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto

6. Sławek Figurski (42) – mąż Figurskiej; średniego wzrostu.
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto

7. Kierowca (45) – przyjazna twarz. Tutaj szukam osoby z doświadczeniem przed kamerą która nie grała w Gliniarzach minimum 2 sezony
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 14.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

8. Czarnecki (51) – ojciec Igora; wysoki, szczupły biznesmen.
Data: 14.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto

9. Stanisław Bartczak (52) – sprawca; krępy, silny. 
Data: 14 i 15.07
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] PROWADZĄCA / WSPÓŁAUTORKA PODCASTU WIDEO**

## Tworzę w Krakowie profesjonalny, kobiecy kanał podcastowy (gdzie pod wspólnym, silnym szyldem funkcjonują różne autorskie pasma). Zamiast budować małe kanały od zera, łączymy siły, krzyżujemy widownie i rośniemy wielokrotnie szybciej.

Szukam do tego projektu współtwórczyń, które chcą poprowadzić swój własny, niezależny format.

Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?
* Twoja działka: Jesteś jedyną twarzą, głosem i szefową swojego formatu. Dostajesz własną playlistę. Wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na rozmowie. Zapraszasz gości, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz swoją markę osobistą.
* Moja działka (Produkcja i Technologia): Pełnię rolę Twojego producenta i realizatora. Zdejmuję z Ciebie 100% technicznego stresu. Dysponuje studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM). Ogarniam też przygotowanie krótkich form (Shorts, Reels) do promocji.

***Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):***

Nie płacisz mi za wynajem studia ani za sprzęt. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami wygenerowanymi bezpośrednio przez Twoje odcinki (przychody z YouTube, kontrakty sponsorskie w Twoim formacie, lokowania) dokładnie po połowie (50/50). Ty masz program bez wkładu finansowego, ja inwestuję swój sprzęt i wiedzę w nasz wspólny sukces.

Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie przed kamerą, współpracę zaczniemy od krótkiego sezonu pilotażowego.

***CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):***

Zależy mi na kobietach, które podchodzą do swoich pomysłów z pełnym profesjonalizmem. Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi opisywać:
* Format i tematykę: Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo ma trafiać? (Ważna uwaga: dbając o bezpieczeństwo i profesjonalizm kanału, omijamy tematy mocno polaryzujące, takie jak ostra polityka, skrajne wojny płci, internetowe dramy czy niesprawdzona pseudonauka).
* Twarde kompetencje: Dlaczego to właśnie Ty powinnaś o tym mówić? Wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia Twojej wiedzy (wykształcenie, doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty lub biznes).
* Bazę gości: Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów (znajomych, współpracowników, ekspertów), których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w swoim programie?

Połączmy Twoją wiedzę z moją produkcją. Stwórzmy razem miejsce, gdzie dobre, kobiece rozmowy dostaną zasięgi, na jakie zasługują. Czekam na Twoją wiadomość.

Life Skills 🌱

**The issue is though**, it can be tricky to know if your child will take to online learning, or to the subject! 🙈

Well, to help with this,** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨** where you can try these classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

items.text:
Hi everyone! 

We are relaunching our **blackout studio** in **South Croydon**, **Aura studios**! 

We are a state of the art blackout studio with a** drive in door**, **rain machine**, **fire machine**, **full lighting and camera equipment** and more to allow our clients to be able to create whatever they need. Whether they have their own kit or just a vision we can help to bring to life!

We offer a wide array of packages from **video and editing content** created specifically to your needs, with our own dedicated production team with years of experience; to **full access** to the studio and equipment you need to best create your vision.

The studio has been around for a few years and produced some incredible shoots over that time, we have just undergone** full renovations** of our floor and lighting set up to allow for the best quality of productions possible. 

To book a session go to https://www.auravisionstudios.com or send me a PM here or on instagram @fye_productions or @auravisionstudios

Use the code 'MAXWELL5' to get 5% of your booking when you book a shoot online or through myself.

items.summary:
Hi everyone! 

We are relaunching our **blackout studio** in **South Croydon**, **Aura studios**! 

We are a state of the art blackout studio with a** drive in door**, **rain machine**, **fire machine**, **full lighting and camera equipment** and more to allow our clients to be able to create whatever they need. Whether they have their own kit or just a vision we can help to bring to life!

We offer a wide array of packages from **video and editing content** created specifically to your needs, with our own dedicated production team with years of experience; to **full access** to the studio and equipment you need to best create your vision.

The studio has been around for a few years and produced some incredible shoots over that time, we have just undergone** full renovations** of our floor and lighting set up to allow for the best quality of productions possible. 

To book a session go to https://www.auravisionstudios.com or send me a PM here or on instagram @fye_productions or @auravisionstudios

Use the code 'MAXWELL5' to get 5% of your booking when you book a shoot online or through myself.

sharedPost.text:
This is a brilliant opportunity to perform for Kate Bone, an award-winning Casting Associate who is exceptionally busy and difficult to schedule. After maintaining contact for the last two years to organise a session, we have finally secured a date for this exclusive event.

Kate’s impressive portfolio includes work on major productions such as:

  - Star Wars
  - Game of Thrones
  - The Crown

Her recent projects include the Agatha Christie production and Star City, both of which were released earlier this year in 2026. Do not miss the chance to showcase your talent to one of the industry's most sought-after casting professionals.

Kate Bone has been Casting Associate with multiple award winning casting directors such as Nina Gold and Robert Sterne for over a decade - operating at the very heart of two of the biggest casting offices in the world.

She has worked on high profile projects including Netflix The Crown, Chernobyl, Succession , The Little Stranger, Star Wars: The Force Awakens, Game of Thrones and The Imitation Games amongst many others.
 

THIS IS A 4-WEEK ACTING COURSE. 

- Your Spotlight Profile: Receive feedback on how your digital presence translates to casting directors.
- Performance Technique: Gain direct insight into your acting choices and execution.
- Career Development: Discuss your trajectory and any industry-specific queries you may have.

The final week will consist of a Mock Casting and Zoom session with Kate, offering a valuable opportunity to apply the skills developed throughout the previous three weeks in a practical setting.
 

Course Schedule:

- Week 1: Sunday, 30th August | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 2: Sunday, 6th September | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 3: Sunday, 13th September | 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
- Week 4 (Final Session Mock Casting : Thursday, 17th September | Evening [Exact Time TBC]

Taught By RESPONDER ACTRESS Chrissy Parle

@studio 96 Media City Manchester

Click here to book your place : https://screenplayacting.com/product/4-week-adult-acting-course-kate-bone/

items.text: Hi everyone, I'm Jordan, based in Havant, Hampshire. I've just finished a very exciting project and now I'm looking at finding my next one. I started my acting career in March and have since completed 5 short films and 4 personal projects. I am happy to provide a self tape of a few lines from your script. I am 6ft 4, I'm a large build (ex rugby player) brown eyes with brown and grey hair, playing age of 27-40. I have references upon request. I just want to keep going and doing more films, so if you have anything lined up that would suit my appearance then please do reach out. Thank you.

📸** Suche Fotograf:in für Model-Digitals / Polaroids**

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich suche jemanden, der professionelle **Model-Digitals / Polaroids** von mir fotografieren kann – idealerweise im Studio mit cleanem Tageslicht-Look. Die Bilder sind für meine Sedcard und Bewerbungen bei Modelagenturen.

**TFP wäre super**, alternativ zahle ich auch gerne eine faire Aufwandsentschädigung.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden empfehlen kann, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht. 😊

⸻

📸** Looking for a photographer for model digitals / polaroids**

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m looking for a photographer to shoot a set of professional **model digitals / polaroids**, ideally in a studio with a clean natural daylight look. The photos will be used for my modeling portfolio and agency applications.

**TFP would be great**, but I’m also happy to pay a reasonable fee if preferred.

Feel free to message me if you’re interested or know someone who might be a good fit. Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m Nanda, a Berlin-based Fashion, Beauty & Portrait Photographer with over 15 years of experience. I’m currently looking for opportunities in Photography, Photo Retouching/Editing, or Social Media Content Management anywhere in Germany.

I have about 4 months left on my Opportunity Card (Chancenkarte) and will be applying for an extension at the end of this month. A job in my field would also help me transition to a German work visa.

At the moment, I’m working part-time in a German restaurant while actively searching for a creative role.

If you know of any openings or can refer me, I’d truly appreciate your support.

🌐 Portfolio: https://nandasphotography.com

📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nanda.prophotographer

✨ Fashion & Beauty: https://www.instagram.com/eurofashion.nanda

Thank you so much! 🙏

STATISTER SØGES TIL DANSK SUPER8 SPILLEFILM - BYLDERUP-BOV (ULØNNET)
Vi søger statister til at agere landbrugsmedarbejdere til en dansk spillefilm som bliver optaget nær Bylderup-Bov. 

Optagelserne finder sted;

Søndag d. 12.. Juli kl 19:00 - 23:30

Mandag d. 13. Juli kl 11-21

Vi søger:

5-8 statister 

Alder: 40+

Køn: underordnet

Der vil være forplejning under optagelserne. 

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig, så længe man har gåpåmod og en sund interesse i at gøre vores film så god som muligt.

Er du interesseret, eller kender du én, som kunne være? Så send en mail til mig med:

- Navn

- Alder

- Telefonnummer

- Et vellignende billede af dig selv

Til mail: lv.studie@gmail.com

Jeg glæder mig at høre fra jer!

Mvh Lauge Visgaard - Produktionsassistent

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID VERTICAL DRAMA**

Seeking **experienced actors** for a new **paid vertical drama** filming in **Atlanta and surrounding areas**.

**Casting Requirements:**
* Portray ages **21–35**
* Prefer experienced vertial actors
* Strong memorization skills with the ability to learn lines quickly
* Ability to deliver nuanced, emotionally grounded performances with strong character development
* Comfortable performing in intense dramatic scenes with supernatural elements
* Authentic acting style preferred — please avoid overly theatrical or caricature-style performances
* No visible tattoos, or tattoos must be easily covered for filming with makeup and/or costume.
* Preferably Atlanta local or will work as local

Characters:

-**Evelyn Har**t: Female, 24, lead, wedding planner, independant, pragmatic, grounded. Transforms from ordinary modern woman to a woman who decides who she is and her own fate.

-**Rowan Ashford**: Male, appears late 20s, lead, has been scorned from the woman he loves and is seeking revenge.

-**Daniel Brooks**: Male, late 20s, supporting, Evelyn's fiance, gentle, principled, always puts Evelyn first, unknowingly comes from a family who guards a dark secret.

-**Vivienne Laurent**: Female, 30s, supporting role, Queen Elara's closest confidant, loyal to the Queen.

-**Queen Elara**: Female, 20s, supporting role, comanding presence and stature.

-**The Obsidian Circle**: 5 supporting actors of an antagonist faction.

**Filming Dates:**
**July 27–31**

**To Submit:**

Please email the following to **[verticalsubmissions@gmail.com](mailto:verticalsubmissions@gmail.com)**:
* Resume
* Headshot (recommended)
* Demo reel (if available) and/or self-tape

**Submission Instructions:**
**Email submissions only. Please do not send personal/direct messages.**

Crew need not apply, we are fully crewed up. This is a casting call ONLY.

items.text:
Hello friends and fellow creatives!
My name is Megan. I am the main creative behind story haven studios. Story haven studios is a production company that is dedicated to bringing powerful stories to life. 

We are built on the belief that every great project begins with a compelling narrative.

We combine innovative storytelling, cinematic craftsmanship, and strategic vision to create content that inspires, entertains, and connects with audiences worldwide.

We transform ideas into immersive experiences, guiding projects from concept to completion with passion, professionalism, and creativity. Whether producing original content, collaborating with brands, or developing groundbreaking entertainment, our mission is to create stories that leave a lasting impact and turn imagination into reality.

With this we are in the preproduction phase of our first film. 

The chase is a fun action packed film about storm chasing and the budding relationships that grow over the weeks of storm chasing as a team. 

The story follows a master student and her professors chase/ research team as they try to collect date for a groundbreaking research paper. Tension grows as so do feelings between the professor and his student over the days of being stuck in a vehicle chasing storms. 

We have our main female character currently casted but we are in search of our male cast. 

These rolls will include being in the field during a storm chase from a safe distance. And potentially some driving as well to get some scenes. We strive to be as authentic as possible without the use of AI or CGI. This film will also be rated PG-13 and no explicit scenes will take place.

Male cast as follows. 

Ryker West (He/Him, 30s/40s, tall, green eyes, light brown to medium brown hair, well maintained facial hair.) Rugged, older, experienced, and undeniably attractive, with a commanding presence that makes him both intimidating and magnetic. His love of classic rock, storm chasing, and his "Twister Tamer" persona add to his adventurous, larger-than-life appeal. He is a meteorology professor and founder of the Tempest Trackers his storm chasing team. 

Joey Jensen (He/Him, 25, tall, blue eyes, medium length blonde wavy hair, deep southern accent, no facial hair.) - Joey is a fun loving larger than life comedic relief throughout the film. His heavy southern accent and vivacious personality make him that much more enjoyable. He is long time friends with Finley having gone to undergrad school with her. He is also in a budding relationship with Hawk who is a fellow storm chaser on the team. 

Diego "Hawk" Lopez (He/Him,30s/40s, Tall, Sunkissed skin, medium to dark brown hair, well-trimmed mustache and beard, brown eyes, physically fit.) - Diego is the best friend of Ryker. His calm professionalism keeps the team grounded during chases. He is the teams lead data analyst and researcher. In a budding relationship with Joey.

Ezra "The Pulse" Smith (He/Him, 30s/40s, tall, darker complexion, friendly brown eyes, dark brown/black hair.)- Ezra is the teams main communications liaison. A ladies' man at heart with a cool professionalism about him.

Provided is our linktree which you can find our socials. 

The audition form is currently live on there as well. 

https://linktr.ee/studiosstoryhaven?utm_source=linktree_profile_share&ltsid=ab4cc909-4e14-47d9-9b98-1f9af0014945

LOOKING FOR A LOOK-ALIKE! 👀👇
We’re casting the older version of my character, Nico (age 73), for an indie feature film shooting right here in the Bay Area this July!

Who: East Asian male, 65–75+ years old.

Experience: Preferred, but absolutely not required.

Look: Someone who could pass as an older version of me (similar eyes/facial features).

If you or a family member/friend fit this description and want to be on a movie set this month, please email thishousemovie@gmail.com!

CASTING / FEATURE FILM / CHINA

We are looking for a girl aged 12–16.

Type: European appearance.

Required: good physical condition, acrobatics / gymnastics / martial arts / Wushu / Karate / Taekwondo / stage combat / stunt training.

Preparation: China. 
Preparation period: early August — early October. 
Shooting period: from October. 
Training: intensive preparation with martial arts masters.

For preliminary selection, please send:

1. Full name;
2. Age;
3. Height;
4. City / country;
5. Recent photos;
6. Video introduction, if available;
7. Video with acrobatics, gymnastics, Wushu, martial arts, stage combat or stunt elements — minimum 2 minutes;
8. Contact of a parent / legal guardian / coach / agent.

Important: minors are considered only through parents, legal guardians, coaches or official representatives.

WhatsApp / Telegram: +998 90 178 15 72 
#castingcall 
#featurefilmcasting 
#casting 
#actioncasting   
#chinafilm

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL: COMPROMISE** (VFS Short Film)

We are casting for actors to join our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, *Compromise*!
* **Logline:** Jacob is about to get married and live a life that everyone envies, but he starts to doubt if this perfect life is what he truly wants.
* **Project Type:** Student Short Film (Non-Union)
* **Shooting Dates:** August 8th & 9th, 2026
* **Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area
* **Rate:** Unpaid (Catering and craft service provided)

📌 **Casting Roles:**
* **JACOB** (Male / 26–32 / Latin)
* **JOSEPHINE** (Female / 40–55 / Latin)
* **FOSCO** (Male / 50–60 / Caucasian)
* **YAYO** (Male / 28–34 / Latin)
* **ROWAN** (Female / 27–31 / Caucasian)
* **GUESTS** (Wedding guests / Non-speaking role)

📬 **How to Submit:** Please send your **Resume, Headshot, and Demo Reel (if possible)** to `vfscompromise@gmail.com` by **July 18th, 2026**.
* Please indicate which role you’d like to be considered for in your email.
* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for a self-tape audition (Self-tape due by July 19th, 2026).

#vfs #vancouverfilmschool #castingcall #shortfilm #studentfilm #compromise

🎬 CASTING CALL – NON-UNION ACTORS
Vancouver Film School is casting for its upcoming supernatural horror-comedy short film:

GIRL MATH

We are currently casting for the following roles:

🌶 PETUNIA (Female, playing age 16–18 | 18–25 to apply)

📚 MISS NOCTIA (Female, playing age 45 | 35–50 to apply)

🏡 VICKY (Female, playing age 45 | 35–50 to apply)

📍 Greater Vancouver Area

🎥 Shoot Dates: August 8–9, 2026

🎭 Non-Union

💰 Unpaid (craft services & catering provided)

To submit, please send:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo Reel (if available)

📩 girlmath.production@outlook.com

⏰ Self-tape deadline: July 19, 2026

🎬 Callbacks: July 21, 2026

Please indicate which role you are submitting for in your email.

items.text:
🎪 REPique Argentino – Available for the 2026/2027 Christmas circus season 🎄
A professional Argentine Malambo show available for Christmas circuses, variety shows, and international productions.

Our act features:
🥁 Live percussion and *bombo* drums
🪢 *Boleadoras*
🔥 High-energy Argentine Malambo
💃 Flamenco fusion
🎭 Striking theatrical staging

✅ Family-friendly show
✅ 6-to-8-minute circus act
✅ Flexible cast size based on production requirements (starting from 3 performers)
✈️ Based in Argentina – available for international contracts.

🎪 REPique Argentino – Available for the 2026/2027 Christmas circus season 🎄
A professional Argentine Malambo show available for Christmas circuses, variety shows, and international productions.

Our act features:
🥁 Live percussion and *bombo* drums
🪢 *Boleadoras*
🔥 High-energy Argentine Malambo
💃 Flamenco fusion
🎭 Striking theatrical staging

✅ Family-friendly show
✅ 6-to-8-minute circus act
✅ Flexible cast size based on production requirements (starting from 3 performers)
✈️ Based in Argentina – available for international contracts.

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Der Sommer lädt vielerorts ein, um die eigenen Lieblingsfilme in gemütlicher Atmosphäre bei kühlen Getränken und kleinen Snacks outdoor zu geniessen.

Wie für eine Movietime üblich gibt es auch Interviews.  Meryl Streep und Stanley Tucci reden nicht bloss über Mode, sondern über die Dreharbeiten zu DER TEUFEL TRÄGT PRADA II

Das Cinema Paradiso bringt in seiner 25. Sommerkino Spielzeit den St Pöltner Rathausplatz zum cineastischen Erstrahlen. Sarah Fuchs präsentiert Ihnen die Highlights der ersten beiden Wochen und konnte außerdem mit dem Geschäftsführer des Cinema Paradiso, Alexander Syllaba, ein Interview führen.

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

sharedPost.text:
RE PHEITHILE ART PRODUCTION IS EXPANDING
 
“Where There Is No Art, A People Die Inside.” 

NEW BRANCHES NOW OPEN IN YOUR TOWN!

Young Creatives of the Free State — This is YOUR moment!

Re Phethile Art Production is growing. We are bringing art, culture & opportunity out of the cities and into your kasi, your school, your community. 

“Art is not a luxury. It is the oxygen of the soul.”

We are now officially recruiting in:
  
✨️Bethlehem
✨️Qwaqwa
✨️Paul Roux
✨️Reitz
✨️Vrede
✨️Senekal
✨️Clarens
✨️Fouriesburg
✨️Rosendal
✨️Lindley  
✨️Kestel
✨️Botshabelo
✨️Petrus Steyn
✨️Brandfort

Additional branches will be announced soon. Youth in other towns, contact us directly to request a branch in your area.

If you live for:
💃🕺Dance
 🎭 Drama
 🎶  Music
🎬 Film  
✍️ Storytelling
🎙Poetry 
🌍 Culture   
📝🖌✏️ Visual Arts
🪘👏 Gwijo & Acappella 

Then build with us.Let’s bring the kasi to life and revive Art & Culture where it matters most. 

“A nation that does not tell its own stories will be told by others.”

EVERYONE IS WELCOME 

All races, all backgrounds — Black, Coloured, Indian, and White youth. Art has no boundaries, only possibilities.

---
HOW TO JOIN:

WhatsApp “JOIN” to 081 750 9746 with:  
1.  Name & Surname  
2.  Age & Gender 
3.  Town 
4.  Recent Picture 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy.
  
Please SHARE this with every young creative you know ✨ 

#RePhethileArt #FreeStateCreativeEconomy #ArtRevival #YouthInArts #KasiToTheWorld

Reviving the Kasi: Why Re Phethile Matters Now” 

There was a time when every kasi had a theatre group, a dance crew practicing on dusty tar, and a choir that could make your chest vibrate. Culture was not something we watched on TV. It was something we lived. 

Today, many of our young people have talent, but they do not have a stage. They have stories, but no microphone. They have dreams, but no structure. That is why Re Phethile Art Production is expanding.

Re Phethile means “we have done it” in Sesotho. It is a declaration. It is a promise that we will not wait for opportunity to come to us. We will build it, town by town, branch by branch. 

From Bethlehem to Botshabelo, Qwaqwa to Clarens, Reitz to Brandfort — we are opening doors. Not just for dancers, actors, or musicians. But for every young person who believes that art can change a life, and a community. 

“If you can dream it, you can stage it.”This is the heartbeat of our work. We believe that poetry can heal, drama can teach, dance can unite, and film can document our truth for generations. 

We welcome every race, every language, every background. Because art does not ask where you come from. It asks what you are willing to create. 

To the youth of the Free State: This is your moment. Do not let it pass you by. WhatsApp us. Show up. Bring your voice, your body, your ideas. We will do the rest together. 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy. 

A re tsoeleng pele ka bonono le setso. Forward with Art & Culture.

items.text:
Praca szuka człowieka!

Teatr dla dzieci szuka aktorki do gry w spektaklach dla najmłodszych.

Praca polega na graniu ról w wesołych bajkach dla dzieci w wieku przedszkolnym głównie we Wrocławiu i okolicach.

Płaca to 3800-4200 na rękę.

Dlaczego warto?

Bo to fajne.

Naprawdę. Bo możesz się wiele nauczyć, sporo zobaczyć i poznać naprawdę nietuzinkowych ludzi. Bo możesz dać mnóstwo radości dzieciakom, a przy okazji nie najgorzej zarobić.

Czego potrzebujesz?

Fajnie byłoby - jakbyś miał/a choćby szczątkowe doświadczenie teatralne.

Poza tym -

Dobra dykcja

Znośna prezencja (ludzie na ulicy nie uciekają na Twój widok, a waga nie usiłuje wczołgać się pod zlew)

Umiejętność ekspresji (tak, nawrzeszczenie na Twojego kota także się liczy!)

Czas - bo trasy już czekają!

Wiadomości proszę na priv. lub email: pawel@arlekin.org.pl

Mimo z lekka niepoważnej treści - oferta pracy jest jak najbardziej poważna - chętnie na dłużej.

items.text:
**🎥  CASTING CALL OUT 🎥**

We are casting for a short film based on a research project exploring the experiences and emotions of ethnic minority police officers within the police force.

The film is voiceover-led, with the characters’ inner thoughts and feelings heard through narration. We are looking for performers who can convey emotion on screen through natural, grounded and compelling performances.

We are currently casting:

**AISHA**
Asian woman, playing a Constable

**SAMIR**
Asian man, playing a frontline officer

**RODGER**
Afro-Caribbean man, playing a Detective

We are also looking for extras of all ethnicities, so there will be a range of opportunities to get involved.

**Filming:** Week commencing 10th August
**Location:** In and around Leicestershire
**Roles:** Paid

To apply, please email your name, headshot and showreel to: olivia@candegroup.co.uk
